DOMAIN_SEPARATOR().notice: Get the domain separator for the token

augmentDebt(address,uint256,uint256).notice: Augment the debt of Gearing Token

flashRepay(uint256,bool,bytes).notice: This function is deprecated, please use `flashRepay(

flashRepay(uint256,uint128,bool,bytes,by.notice: Repay the debt of Gearing Token,         The borrower can repay the debt after receiving the collateral

getCollateralValue(bytes).notice: Return the value of collateral in USD with base decimals

getGtConfig().notice: Return the configuration of Gearing Token

getLiquidationInfo(uint256).notice: Return the liquidation info of the loan

liquidatable().notice: Return the flag to indicate debt is liquidatable or not

liquidate(uint256,uint128,bool).notice: Liquidate the loan when its ltv bigger than liquidationLtv or expired.         The ltv can not inscrease after liquidation.         A maximum of 10% of the repayment amount of collateral is given as a         reward to the protocol and liquidator,         The proportion of collateral liquidated will not exceed the debt liquidation ratio.

loanInfo(uint256).notice: Return the loan information of Gearing Token

merge(uint256[]).notice: Merge multiple Gearing Tokens into one

mint(address,address,uint128,bytes).notice: Mint this token to an address

removeCollateral(uint256,bytes).notice: Remove collateral from the loan.         Require the loan to value bigger than maxLtv after this action.

repay(uint256,uint128,bool).notice: Repay the debt of Gearing Token.         If repay amount equals the debt amount, Gearing Token's owner will get his collateral.

repayAndRemoveCollateral(uint256,uint128.notice: Repay the debt of Gearing Token and remove collateral

updateConfig(bytes).notice: Set the configuration of Gearing Token
